title: FUN IN THE SUN - 211info
text: PHILOMATH YOUTH ACTIVITIES CLUB FUN IN THE SUN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an all-day summer camp with full-time and drop-in care. Provides daily activities including crafts, swimming, games, projects, field trips, and movies. 421 S 19th Street Philomath, OR 97370 Eligibility: Children entering first grade in the fall-age 12 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm follows the Philomath School District summer break schedule Email (541) 929-4040 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 929-4040 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website to register. Registration is usually in mid-April. FEES: -$25 registration fee charged after May 16 -$160 per week or drop-in for $50 per day plus fees DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Philomath Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH ATHLETICS PUBLIC SAFETY - PHILOMATH SAFETY TOWN PUBLIC SAFETY - SAFETY TOWN SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CLEMENS CLUBHOUSE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ONE CIRCLE GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PHILOMATH YOUTH ACTIVITIES CLUB
